scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy cloudflare-dist
scripts.test: node scripts/test-survey-scan.mjs && node scripts/test-survey-ocr.mjs && node scripts/test-csp.mjs && node scripts/test-tours.mjs
scripts.check: node --check src/survey-scan.js && node --check src/survey-ocr.js && node --check src/dynamic-app.js && node --check scripts/paddleocr-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/serve.mjs && node --check scripts/build.mjs
